challenge: Stand apart from the generic aesthetics of Australian real estate without losing the trust signals that category buyers expect. Modern but grounded — a brand that could work on a For Sale board as convincingly as on a digital ad.
approach: The M-arch motif — structural, architectural, immediately ownable — formed the foundation of the identity. A teal-green palette positioned Marsh as fresh and forward-thinking. Every touchpoint was designed to convert, with a free property appraisal CTA as the central mechanic across digital, print, and signage.
title: Branding Refresh and Website
description: Brand identity for a Cairns-based climate technology startup.
